title: Extracting Sentiment from Customer Reviews
scenario: Create a prompt that extracts sentiment (positive, negative, or neutral) from customer reviews, assuming it's a plain text document with the following format: Review 1: ... Review 2: ... ... Review 5: ... The output should be a JSON array with each review as a separate object, along with the extracted sentiment. The prompt should be under 100 words and use an informal tone. There will be at least 5 customer reviews.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt is under 100 words and uses an informal tone.
Check if the JSON syntax is valid and correctly formatted.
Check if the extracted sentiment is accurately extracted from the given customer reviews.
